title: New Batch Creation Behaviour
text: To add new items, tap the blue '+ ADD' button on a dashboard row. You can safely abort this process at any point by tapping the grey 'CANCEL' button at the bottom of the form, or the 'X' icon in the top right corner. If you proceed and tap 'Save to Stock', any item containing distinct parameters (like a different size, location, or expiry date) will independently spawn its own dedicated inventory batch row.

title: Stock Decrement Behaviour & Batch Deletion
text: The system uses a strict safety-first approach to stock reduction. Tapping the minus button will decrement batch quantity seamlessly until it reaches 1. Tapping minus on the final unit will trigger a high-contrast confirmation modal. You can either confirm the deletion, or cancel the action to safely back out and leave your final item intact.

title: Smart Size Memory & Rotation
text: Custom sizes are instantly memorized and placed as a Smart Size chip for that item. The system maintains a persistent 3-slot custom memory per item. A 4th unique custom size will seamlessly evict the oldest entry. The 5 static default anchors (e.g. 50g, 100g, 1kg) always remain locked in place.

title: Smart Size Memory Removal
text: The active memory is directly tied to your physical inventory. When you delete or consume the last batch of a specific custom size (reducing its quantity to zero), the system automatically forgets that exact Smart Size chip to prevent Ghost Clutter, while safely retaining all other active sizes.

title: Catalog & Visibility Synchronization
text: The Catalog acts as the strict source of truth. Items become visible in the main list only after creation in the Catalog. To protect structural integrity, the system disables the category deletion button if any underlying items still exist within it, explicitly preventing orphaned data.

title: Duplicate Batch Aggregation (Upsert)
text: To maintain a clean and uncluttered inventory, the system intelligently merges identical stock records. If you submit a new batch with the exact same Size, Location, and Expiry Date as an existing batch, the system will seamlessly aggregate them into a single row, boosting the quantity while refreshing the entry date.

title: Strategic Resupply & Unit-Count Guidance
text: The Restocking List transforms your inventory data into actionable purchase orders. By configuring 'MIN' and 'MAX' unit-count thresholds in the Catalog, the system automatically calculates physical shortfalls. If a 'Default Size' is defined (e.g., 175ml), the list provides the exact number of units required to reach your target (e.g., 3 x 175ml), ensuring precise replenishment.

title: Logistics Recipient & Streamlined Sharing
text: To minimize repetitive data entry, you can store a default email recipient for your replenishment briefings. In the 'SYSTEM' tab of the Catalog, enter your preferred address (e.g. self or supply officer). This field automatically pre-fills your email client whenever you tap 'SHARE' from the Restocking List. You can still manually change or add recipients at the point of dispatch as needed.

title: Strategic Silence & Operational Noise Reduction
text: To minimize cognitive load, the restocking engine follows a 'Strategic Silence' protocol. Items remain hidden from the Restocking List while they are within their safe operational range (between MIN and MAX thresholds). An alert is only triggered once the 'MIN' survival threshold is breached, at which point both the immediate MIN shortfall and long-term MAX goal are surfaced for escalation.

title: Mess Hall Recipes & AI Kitchen Intelligence
text: The system provides an offline-first Recipe Prompt Generator to help you utilize your soon-to-expire stockpile. By configuring dietary preferences and ingredient overrides, the app dynamically structures an optimized markdown prompt containing your exact inventory status. You can copy this prompt and paste it into any Allied AI to instantly receive actionable, prioritized recipes perfectly tailored to your tactical kitchen.

title: 3-Mode Culinary Strategy
text: The engine supports three tactical modes: EXPERIMENTAL (Zero-waste AI improv), INSPIRED ( Adoption of a specific chef's seasonal style/voice), and AUTHENTIC (Archival research to find real, published recipe matches). Each mode dynamically restructures the prompt constraints to prioritize either creative improvisation or high-fidelity professional matches.

title: The Conflict Guardian (Safety First)
text: The system acts as an automated safety officer. It cross-references your current 'Expiring' stock with your dietary doctrine and 'Allergy' list. If a required item conflicts with a safety constraint, high-contrast alerts will trigger to warn you before the prompt is finalized, ensuring every meal mission remains safe.

title: Archival Search & 404 Recovery
text: In AUTHENTIC mode, the AI uses a 'Robust' validation protocol. It must confirm that each recipe URL returns a valid HTTP 200 status. If an official link is dead, the AI is commanded to pivot to a verified archive or trusted 'copycat' record of that specific recipe, ensuring maximum archival fidelity.

title: Culinary Expert & Archive Library
text: You can anchor your recipes to one of 10+ legendary experts and archives, including Ramsay, Oliver, BBC Good Food, and many more. This influences the AI's seasoning style, technique priorities, and voice—transforming raw ingredients into professional-grade briefings.

title: Rapid AI Deployment Stations
text: The Recipe Engine allows you to configure up to three preferred AI deployment stations (e.g. ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude). Once your briefing is generated, tapping a station instantly copies the prompt and navigates you to that specific web portal. A Deployment Briefing dialog initially introduces this cost-free manual-paste process, but you can choose to bypass the dialog in the future for a true one-click blastoff experience.

title: Memorized Chef Intelligence
text: The Recipe Engine allows you to define any custom culinary expert for the AI to emulate. By typing a name into the 'SUGGEST A CHEF' input, you can expand your culinary horizons beyond the curated list. The system automatically memorizes your last two unique suggestions, promoting them to the clickable chip row for rapid, zero-friction access in future sessions.
